title: symphyotrichum jessicae
intro: Symphyotrichum jessicae, also known as Jessica's Aster or New England Aster, is a perennial plant species in the sunflower family native to eastern North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce pain and swelling, and prevent infection. The health benefits of Symphyotrichum jessicae include its ability to support respiratory health, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote a good night's sleep. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used to support overall well-being.
